summary.en-US: Listen to YouTube and YouTube Music without downloading video. Audio-only playback saves battery and data, with background and lock-screen play, ad and telemetry blocking, segment skipping, loudness normalization, EQ, and audio download.

release_notes.en-US:
Listen to YouTube and YouTube Music as audio only. The extension points the player at a direct audio stream and stops the video download at its source, so your battery and mobile data last far longer while the sound keeps playing. Native controls stay intact.

Highlights:
- Audio-only playback with background and lock-screen play.
- Ad and telemetry blocking, on by default and quiet.
- SponsorBlock-style skipping of sponsor reads and off-topic intros; only a tiny hash ever leaves your machine to look them up.
- YouTube Music loudness normalization and a 5-band equalizer.
- Save the current track as a single .m4a file.
- Optional tidy-ups: hide Shorts, recommendations, or comments; cap quality; stop autoplay-next.

Logged out only, and it collects nothing: no analytics, no phone-home, and the media it fetches is requested without your cookies. When a video cannot play as audio only (live, made-for-kids, age-restricted, or members-only) it hands you back to normal YouTube. Firefox 128 and up, desktop and Android.
